summary: Bug fix verified: Total Produced metric corrected. Backend API returns correct 'total_completed' (5,288 from COMPLETOS orders) and 'in_production' (6,000 from MAQUINA* boards). Old 10,030 production_logs value no longer appears. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend verified both CapacityPlanModal and ProductionScreen show correct values.

feature_tested.name: Capacity Plan Bug Fix - Total Completed and In Production metrics
feature_tested.description: After deleting orders, Total Produced still showed 10,030 from old production_logs. Fix: 'total_completed' = sum of qty from COMPLETOS orders, 'in_production' = sum of qty from MAQUINA* boards

endpoints.GET /api/capacity-plan: Returns total_completed (COMPLETOS qty sum), in_production (MAQUINA* qty sum), and machine stats filtered by existing orders

frontend_playwright.old_10030_not_visible: PASS - Old Total Produced value not visible anywhere

database_state.production_logs_total: 10,030 (from historical data - NOT shown in UI)

features_verified: GET /api/capacity-plan returns 'total_completed' = sum of qty from COMPLETOS board (5288)
GET /api/capacity-plan returns 'in_production' = sum of qty from MAQUINA* boards (6000)
Old 'total_produced' field removed from root API response
Machine 'total_produced' only counts logs for orders in COMPLETOS (filtered by completed_order_ids)
Frontend CapacityPlanModal shows 'Completado' card with green color (5,288)
Frontend CapacityPlanModal shows 'En Produccion' card with blue color (6,000)
Frontend ProductionScreen shows both new metrics in header
Old 'Total Produced' (10,030) no longer appears in UI
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session for capacity plan API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Capacity plan bug fix verified. Backend correctly filters production data by existing orders only. 'total_completed' = COMPLETOS orders qty sum, 'in_production' = MAQUINA* boards qty sum. Frontend components CapacityPlanModal.js and ProductionScreen.js correctly display new metrics with data-testid attributes: plan-total-completed, plan-in-production, prod-screen-completed, prod-screen-in-production.
